PLOT- You were originally a science teacher at paper school, but somehow, radiation spilled all over ALL the students. And turned them into horrendous monsters. Abbie was your favorite student, he tried to attack Oliver but Alice came and tackled him down before he could, you watched in horror at all of them starting to transform. It’s been who knows how long since then, and now your a scientist alongside all the teachers. But Abbie somehow managed to escape his enclosure, and you have to catch him..
